titles.title: How Majestic Is Your Name in All the Earth

authors.author: Michael W. Smith
Michael W. Smith
O Herr, unser Gott, wie herrlich ist Dein Name in aller Welt

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: O, Lord, our Lord How majestic is Your name in all the earth O, Lord, our Lord How majestic is Your name in all the earth

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: O Lord, we praise Your name O Lord, we magnify Your name Prince of peace, mighty God O Lord, God Almighty

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: O Lord, we praise Your name O Lord, we magnify Your name Prince of peace, mighty God O Lord, God Almighty, Almighty

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: O, Lord, our Lord How majestic is Your name in all the earth

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: O Lord, we praise Your name O Lord, we magnify Your name O Lord, we praise Your name O Lord, we magnify Your name

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Prince of peace, mighty God O Lord, God Almighty Prince of peace, mighty God O Lord, God Almighty We magnify Your name
